prompt: I have a tech spec for fixing the login validation bug. The spec is at _bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/tech-spec-fix-login-validation.md. Go ahead and implement it.

assertions.description: Routes to Quick Flow instead of Phase 4 when user provides a tech-spec
Reads the provided tech-spec file before starting implementation
Does NOT check for sprint-status.yaml or epics.md
Spawns a sub-agent that invokes bmad-quick-dev with the spec path
Creates bmad-auto team before spawning sub-agents
